cb_step_1.title: Select the Pelvic Volume
cb_step_1.instruction: Select the pelvic volume from the dropdown.

cb_step_4.title: Untick fragments to exclude
cb_step_4.instruction: Untick any fragments that should be excluded from planning.

cb_step_8.title: Manually adjust a fragment?
cb_step_8.instruction: Check the box if you want to manually adjust a fragment.

cb_step_9.title: Select a fragment to adjust
cb_step_9.instruction: Choose which fragment needs adjustment from the dropdown.

cb_step_10.title: Adjust fragment position
cb_step_10.instruction: Use the transform tools to adjust the position and rotation of the selected fragment.

cb_step_13.title: Edit screw trajectories?
cb_step_13.instruction: Check the box if you want to edit screw trajectories.

cb_step_14.title: Adjust screw trajectories
cb_step_14.instruction: Use the transform tools to adjust the position and rotation of the screw trajectories.

cb_step_15.title: Click the "Regenerate screw from edited lines" button

cb_step_16.title: Untick "Edit Screw trajectories"
cb_step_16.instruction: Uncheck the 'Edit Screw trajectories' checkbox to return to planning.

operation_descriptions: Segment the pelvis from the CT volume
Segment the fractures from the CT volume
Register and reduce fracture fragments (second call)
Select a fragment for manual adjustment
Manually adjust the position and rotation of the selected fragment.
Apply the manual adjustments to the fragment
Manually adjust the position and rotation of the screw trajectories.
Regenerate screw models from edited trajectories

ground_api_evidence_note: ground_api_evidence is pre-revision retrieval evidence; final_api_evidence reflects the current validated templates.
